svg.title: Harare City Council AI Platform – Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: Modular architecture showing four layers: Citizen Interface, LLM Gateway orchestration, backend services (RAG, RASA, Governance Dashboard), and data stores.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do citizens interact with the platform?')
sendPrompt('What does the LLM Gateway do?')
g.text: Intent classification · Query rewriting · RAG retrieval · Synthesis · Hallucination guard
Session memory · Knowledge gap logging · External service routing

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the RAG system do?')
sendPrompt('What does the RASA engine do?')
sendPrompt('What does the Governance Dashboard do?')
sendPrompt('What does Ollama do in this architecture?')
g.text: Local AI runtime — Llama 1B intent/rewrite · Llama 3B fallback synthesis · Full offline mode

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does report data get stored?')
sendPrompt('How are council documents stored and managed?')

svg.text: Click any component to learn more
